buildCommand: pip install -r requirements.txt && mkdir -p chromium-bin && curl -fsSL https://github.com/Sparticuz/chromium/releases/latest/download/chromium-v131-linux-x64.tar.gz -o /tmp/chromium.tar.gz && tar -xzf /tmp/chromium.tar.gz -C chromium-bin && chmod +x chromium-bin/chromium && rm /tmp/chromium.tar.gz && cd frontend && npm run build
